title: ObligationSet
description: Deterministically derived legal implementation obligations assigned to one teacher for one class.

teacher_ref.description: District identifier for the teacher responsible for this obligation set; it is not required to be a UUID.

class_ref.description: District or SIS identifier for the class in which these obligations must be implemented.

subject.description: Instructional subject used to select and contextualize obligations for this class.

generated_at.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp ending in Z when the deterministic obligation set was generated.

rules_version.description: Immutable version identifier of the deterministic rule registry used to derive these obligations.

obligations.description: Individual implementation requirements traceable to stable accommodations and cited deterministic rules.

id.description: Stable UUID identifying this derived teacher obligation across regeneration when its source accommodation and assignment are unchanged.

student_ref.description: District identifier for the student whose approved accommodation creates this obligation.

accommodation_id.description: Stable UUID of the source IEP accommodation, preserved across re-extractions through identity reconciliation.

rule_id.description: Stable identifier of the deterministic rule that distributed or transformed the source accommodation into this obligation.

citation.description: Legal or policy citation supporting the deterministic rule and rendered for reviewer verification.

action_text.description: Mandatory teacher action produced exclusively by the deterministic rules engine and never authored or altered by an LLM.

practice_text.description: Optional subject-specific implementation guidance authored later by the LLM, or null before brief generation.

status.description: Teacher workflow state indicating whether the obligation awaits action, has been confirmed, or has been flagged for resolution.

confirmed_at.description: UTC RFC 3339 confirmation timestamp ending in Z when status is confirmed, otherwise null.

flag_reason.description: Teacher-provided explanation when status is flagged, otherwise null.
